figures.caption: Figure 4: Test 2. Convergence history of the Picard iteration. The left image shows the relative changes relU(k) and relP(k), while the right image shows the relative residuals ResU(k) and ResP(k).
Figure 5: Test 3. First row: true initial velocity components and pressure. Second row: reconstructed initial velocity components and pressure. Third row: pointwise relative reconstruction errors.
Figure 1: Test 1. First row: true velocity components and initial pressure. Second row: reconstructed velocity components and initial pressure. Third row: pointwise relative reconstruction errors.
Figure 2: Test 1. Convergence history of the Picard iteration. The left image shows the relative changes relU(k) and relP(k), while the right image shows the relative residuals ResU(k) and ResP(k).
Figure 6: Test 3. Convergence history of the Picard iteration. The left image shows the relative changes relU(k) and relP(k), while the right image shows the relative residuals ResU(k) and ResP(k).
Figure 3: Test 2. First row: true initial velocity components and pressure. Second row: reconstructed initial velocity components and pressure. Third row: pointwise relative reconstruction errors.
